title: Cherry UI
description: Your cherry on top! Makes Minecraft look comfy with cherry blossom style.
body:
![Cherry UI. Your Cherry on top!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66b101933cbf563c113fbc8298b76c358c9c48f8.png)

# **Cherry UI**
**This resource pack stylizes your Minecraft UI in Cherry Blossom style, making it look so cozy, adding a cherry on top.**

## **Currently Replaces**
- User Interface: _Loading Screen_, Menu Background, Buttons, Tooltips and etc.
- Click sounds
- _Minecraft Icon_

_Italic font_ - Mod required, not neccessary.

_Loading screen_ - Puzzle or OptiFine

_Minecraft Icon_ - Old MC Logo

## **Supports**
- [Old MC Logo](https://modrinth.com/mod/old-mc-logo)
![Minecraft icon replaced with Cherry Blossom tree icon using Old MC Logo Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a62a9aae48faac85239ed743bedd78864c9e871c_0.webp)
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)
- OptiFine
- Fits well with [Animated Inventory](https://modrinth.com/mod/animated-inventory)!

### **Credits:**
Thanks to them!
Check NOTICE.md inside the resouce pack for detailed information.
- [BetterTooltip](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettertooltip), also check out [Pride Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/organization/pride-tooltips)! By [rotgruengelb](https://modrinth.com/user/rotgruengelb)
- [Fox Pet Inventory](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fox-pet-inventory) by [NoxVia](https://modrinth.com/user/NoxVia)
- [Cherry_hunger](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cherry_hunger) by [PotaDOS_](https://modrinth.com/user/PotaDOS_)
